The breakdown of timeless scam

It's the standard banner pity. 30 to guarantee SSR, 3 SSR to guarantee a limited pull. But in timeless scam you can get either the wheel or the unit.

If you get 2 wheels in a row your next limited pull is guaranteed to be the unit.

So worst odds is 270 just to pull one character, while for limited rerun you can get the character in 90 rolls at most, with wheel being 60 before guaranteeing

There's a couple items in the game that let's you "get" more units

Protoparadise: used to get any standard unit

Prototype horizon: can get a soul shard (dupe) of any unit. You use this only on limited units or else you lose value

Book of rotation: the protoparadise version for wheels

Time loop master: the wheel version of prototype horizon

Rebirth core: an item that let's you select ANY UNIT, even limited units. Rn only available by buying 30k silver prime.

Timeworn has a passive that stacks up to 3 times. At the 3rd stack her cards get a boost. 
Her basic attack activates 7 times, her defense refuses enemy strength and draws a card, 
her skill that draws a card and reduces the arith count by 1 becomes a Ramona ult,
Her skill 3 card either deals extra damage and regens key flare or refunds it's cost,
And her exalt allows you to select any posse that you've unlocked and use it in battle. If Ramona is at e3 then her exalt also draws 2 or 3 cards and reduces their cost to 0.

you get the scaled amount multiplied by the arithmetica they spend
